title: Rainy Days
overview: While getting drenched in the rain, Fuji encounters an "abandoned dog" on the street and brings it home.

title: The Evening Sun
overview: Fuji and her "dog" go on a walk with her neighbor Kii and her dog Kinako. Then Fuji's dad, Tatsuo, shows up.

title: Friends
overview: Fuji's friends from school, Ren and Mimi, visit her for a gyoza party.

title: Summer Festival
overview: You, Fuji, Kii, and Fuji's parents go to the summer festival, and You disappears.

title: The Same Moon
overview: Fuji meets manga artist Tokaku Arata in a video meeting. You and Fuji meet Medaka and Noriko on their walk.

title: The Cat and Pumpkins
overview: Fuji's twin brother, Teru, and his pregnant wife, Wako, leave their cat at Fuji's.

title: It's Nothing
overview: Fuji encounters a writer's block and cannot get out of it.

title: The Cry
overview: Fuji hears You cry for the first time.

title: A Secret
overview: It turns out that Fuji doesn't want others to know she's a writer.

title: A River That Cannot Be Crossed
overview: Fuji reaches out to Ren for support as she struggles with writer's block.

title: New Things, Old Things
overview: Fuji gets Mimi and Ren to help out with her spring cleaning.

title: I Can Hear the Sound of the Rain
overview: Fuji thinks of reasons she loves the rain.
